name: Lust at First Bite
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Orange curacao OR 1/3 cup Grand Marnier
recipeInstructions:
1. Skinned and boned.
2. Cover chicken breasts with wax paper and flatten the breasts using a mallet.
3. Season inside and out with salt and pepper.
4. Mix all ingredients from step two together in a bowl and set aside.
5. Melt butter.
6. Add remaining ingredients from step three to the melted butter and toss to blend.
7. Stuff chicken breasts with the mixture and place them in au gratin dishes.
8. Pour half of banana mixture over chicken and bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes, basting once.
9. Top breasts with sliced bananas and spoon sauce over.
10. Return to oven for 2 to 3 minutes and serve.
